steps.t: Elfsige is in Floodwend, north of the Mead Hall. You have heard that Elfsige has a bow that sounds like it belongs to Corudan, and should ask him to r…
Corudan is in Floodwend, north of the Mead Hall.
Alwold is on the road outside Floodwend. Elfsige has agreed to race you to Elthengels, with the winner of the race taking all claim to Corudan's bow. …
